title: stelis scalena
intro: Stelis scalena, also known as the 'Yellow Bird Orchid', is a species of flowering orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Stelis scalena include treating coughs, colds, and fever, as well as providing relief from sore throats and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Stelis scalena can be made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water, which is then used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
